core_values: Precision: Data is the hero. Zero ambiguity.
Speed: Visuals must feel fast. No laggy animations.
Focus: Dark mode is not an option, it is the law. Reduce eye strain.
Reality: Simulate the pressure of real trading through high-stakes visual cues.

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;600;800&display=swap');

usage_rules.headings: Use 'Manrope' for all page titles and widget headers. Weight: 600 or 800. Tracking: tight.
usage_rules.body: Use 'Inter' for labels, navigation, and general text. Weight: 400 or 500.
usage_rules.data: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numbers, prices, P&L, and tabular data. This is non-negotiable for a trading app.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] transition-all active:scale-95 rounded-sm px-6 py-2
buttons.buy: bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white w-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)]
buttons.sell: bg-rose-600 hover:bg-rose-700 text-white w-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(239,68,68,0.3)]

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500/20 placeholder:text-zinc-600 text-zinc-200

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use framer-motion to create a glowing border effect on active trade cards.
visual_enhancers.neon_accents: Use 1px solid borders with 2px inner glow for 'Active' states.
visual_enhancers.scanlines: Optional: Add a subtle CRT scanline overlay (opacity 0.02) for retro-tech feel.

images.description: Abstract dark wavy lines, perfect for login screen background to minimize distraction.
images.usage: Login/Register page background with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80).
Placeholder for empty states or landing page feature showcase.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'phosphor-icons' if more technical weight is needed.

principles: Linear: Avoid bouncy springs. Trading is serious.
Feedback: Every click must have an immediate visual response (color shift or scale).

rules: Contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Light gray on dark gray is risky—check carefully.
Color Blindness: Do not rely solely on Red/Green. Use Icons (Arrow Up/Down) alongside colors.
Focus: Visible focus rings (blue-500) are mandatory for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Override tailwind.config.js colors with the Zinc-950 palette defined above. Do NOT use the default slate/gray.
3. LAYOUT: Build the Dashboard using the 'Bento' methodology. Don't just stack rows.
4. TRADING VIEW: This is the most critical screen. It needs a 3-column layout: (1) Watchlist/Positions, (2) Main Chart (Wide), (3) Order Entry (Right).
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style the X/Y axis to be minimal. Remove grid lines or make them very subtle.
6. COMPONENTS: Create a 'Card' component that accepts a 'glow' prop to activate the Tracing Beam effect.
7. AUTH: Use the provided abstract background image for the login page. Add a glassmorphic card on top.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
